title: Your Place
content:
Is your place a small place?
        Tend it with care!--
                    He set you there.

    Is your place a large place?
        Guard it with care!--
                    He set you there.

    Whatever your place, it is
        Not yours alone, but His
                    Who set you there.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham) delivers a powerful performance in "Your Place"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
